economic_hypothesis: The frozen campaign-0018 accounts are profitable and MLL-safe but opportunity-limited; replacing low marginal sleeves, changing deterministic conflict priority, and deploying bounded extra risk only in favorable account-buffer states can increase stress-resilient target velocity without creating a material MLL deterioration.
who_pays_and_why_it_may_persist: The underlying frozen sleeves retain their preregistered market mechanisms; this campaign tests whether unused opportunity coverage and account-path coordination recover return that was previously lost to inactive sessions, low-value turnover, and conflict ordering rather than inventing a new market anomaly.

ranking_policy.tier_1: positive normal and stressed expectancy, no compliance failure, bounded MLL, no impossible fill
ranking_policy.tier_2: pass probability, lower and median target progress, target velocity, consistency, MLL buffer, normal and stressed costs
ranking_policy.tier_3: funded and payout simulation only after a serious Combine survivor exists

falsification_rule: If the matched-parent family tripwire is not green, tombstone only this exact robustness class and move the 20 percent distinct-mechanism lane forward. If green but no child improves the account gate, allocate generation 0021 to the dominant measured failure. Do not tune this manifest after results.
CONTRE: All children reuse development outcomes that selected the 0018 elite cohort, so even a green matched-parent result is development evidence with selection bias. A pass increase may also come from bounded sizing rather than a new edge; only stress resilience, broad start coverage, parent uplift, and later untouched confirmation can support promotion.
